mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy (CalibrationStage + StdPowerMutationalStage) awards more havoc mutations to the small, fast, stable structured-header seeds, concentrating effort until the longer TE-enabling input is assembled and stabilized.
one_line: calibrated energy concentrates havoc on stable structured seeds to build TE-enabling input

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy (CalibrationStage perf_score driving StdPowerMutationalStage) concentrates more havoc mutations on compact fast stable GPOS-bearing font seeds, reaching the attachment-flag gate faster than naive's flat scheduling.
one_line: calibrated energy amplifies mutation effort on compact GPOS seeds to set attachment flag

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy grants compact valid-font seeds more havoc iterations per visit; this concentrates mutation budget on near-valid shaping inputs until a glyph with the UNSAFE_TO_BREAK flag mask bit is produced.
one_line: calibrated energy focuses havoc on small valid-font seeds to set UNSAFE_TO_BREAK mask bit

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy (perf_score from speed/size/stability, PowerSchedule None) gives small fast table-bearing font seeds disproportionate havoc iterations, compounding their structured byte content until the valid GPOS table_index==1 path is reached.
one_line: calibrated energy amplifies havoc on small fast font seeds toward valid GPOS table_index gate

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy assigns disproportionate mutation budget to compact fast stable valid-header seeds, enabling them to approach the variable-font structural gate (table_index==1 and num_coords non-zero) where naive's flat energy stalls.
one_line: calibrated energy concentrates havoc on compact valid font headers toward variable-font structural gate

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy (CalibrationStage perf_score, no rarity weighting) grants small fast near-valid font seeds extra havoc mutations per visit, completing the kern-table structure that flips hb_ot_layout_has_machine_kerning to false.
one_line: calibrated energy concentrates havoc on near-valid kern seeds to complete machine-kerning table structure

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy gives well-behaved KHUDAWADI seeds more havoc mutations per visit (PowerSchedule None perf_score), raising the odds that havoc stumbles onto the specific 4-byte follower codepoint (0x112E0-0x112E8 range) that naive's flat budget rarely reaches.
one_line: calibrated energy raises per-seed mutation count on KHUDAWADI seeds to hit specific follower codepoint arm

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy (perf_score from speed/size/stability) concentrates havoc mutations on parseable SELECT seeds, raising the probability that havoc inserts a '<' byte (0x3c) producing a valid 'SELECT ... < ...' expression that compiles to OP_Lt; purely a scheduling effect with no CMP introspection.
one_line: calibrated energy biases havoc toward parseable SELECT seeds to insert OP_Lt '<' operator

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy concentrates havoc mutations on fast small stable SELECT-expression seeds; the extra mutation budget on those seeds raises the chance havoc produces a long well-formed expression that walks deep enough to accumulate a resolver error and set pParse->nErr.
one_line: calibrated energy focuses mutations on SELECT-expression seeds to reach resolver error path

mechanism_summary: Calibrated energy (CalibrationStage perf_score) grants faster smaller more-stable SELECT seeds more havoc mutations per visit, raising the chance havoc assembles the required integer-literal arithmetic body that reaches codeInteger's true branch.
one_line: calibrated energy amplifies havoc on small SELECT seeds to reach integer codeInteger branch
